summary: ConPTY AI TUI output recovery and input-lag mitigation must be added to BGSTAB SRS as Settings, server transport, frontend recovery, telemetry, and validation requirements.
ambiguities: The implementation plan spans multiple behavior surfaces; kiwi-srs split is required.
Wave6 excluded telemetry and stabilityModes from its selected Settings v1 contract; this run treats the ConPTY Settings work as a later, narrower extension rather than discarding FR-BGSTAB-013.
implied_requirements: All new runtime queue, flush, timeout, threshold, and mode values must be Settings-editable when they have a runtime consumer.
Recovery ordering must preserve snapshot, ACK-pending tail, session:ready, and queued input release ordering.
Telemetry and soak artifacts must not persist raw terminal input or output.

semantic_equivalences.prompt_term: ConPTY output recovery and input lag
semantic_equivalences.srs_term: BuilderGate terminal stability, visible output scheduling, browser input backpressure, and WebSocket backpressure
